MOHAMMED AL-RASHID
Operations Manager
Sharjah, UAE
+971 56 234 5678
m.alrashid@email.com

SUMMARY
Results-driven Operations Manager with 12 years in manufacturing and logistics. Expert in lean manufacturing, Six Sigma, and supply chain optimization. Managed teams of 50+ across UAE operations.

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Operations Manager | Al-Futtaim Logistics | Dubai | 2017 – Present
• Oversee daily operations across 3 distribution centres serving GCC markets
• Implemented Six Sigma methodologies reducing waste by 30%
• Managed P&L of AED 45M annual operations budget
• Led cross-functional teams of 55 staff including warehouse, fleet, and customer service
• Introduced automated inventory management system reducing stock-outs by 25%

Plant Supervisor | Emirates Manufacturing Co. | Ajman | 2012 – 2017
• Supervised production floor of 80+ workers across 2 shifts
• Enforced lean manufacturing principles and 5S workplace organization
• Coordinated with procurement and quality assurance teams

EDUCATION
MBA Operations Management | American University of Sharjah | 2015
BSc Industrial Engineering | Khalifa University | 2011

CERTIFICATIONS
• Six Sigma Black Belt
• Lean Manufacturing Practitioner
• PMP (Project Management Professional)

CORE COMPETENCIES
Operations Management, Lean Manufacturing, Supply Chain, Six Sigma, Team Leadership, Budget Management, Process Improvement, Warehouse Management, Fleet Operations

LANGUAGES
Arabic (Native), English (Fluent), Hindi (Conversational)
